productDisplayName: Bata Men Remo Black Formal Shoes
description: Style NoteCreate the right board room impression with this stacked-heeled formal shoe from bata. Bata is a household name when it comes to footwear and this shoe tells us why - with its sleek upper and tough outsole. Brave the city traffic with this shoe that is as hard wearing as it as stylish, at a reasonable price!Product DetailsLeather upper with stitch details at the seams of the toe boxPadded inner and tongueClassic four hole lace upsUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel that has groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlight
